name: Playable Tech
short_description: Playable Technology is a skilled group of creatives and developers, founded as a studio in 2020, continuing the work begun 15 years earlier as the core development team and founders of Skoogmusic
about: Playable Technology is a skilled group of creatives and developers, founded as a studio in 2020, continuing the work begun 15 years earlier as the core development team and founders of Skoogmusic.
